subject: docs(claude): sync shared scaffolding from external glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Fetched latest CLAUDE.md from devmade-ai/glow-props and merged changes
into canva-grid's shared scaffolding sections while preserving all
project-specific content.

Changes merged:
- Added "Fetching External CLAUDE.md" section with curl command and
  merge instructions to prevent future confusion about the source
- Added Triggers section (10 analysis commands: review, audit, docs,
  mobile, clean, performance, security, debug, improve, start)
- Added prohibition against interactive input prompts
- Added sibling repo access AI note (GitHub API pattern)
- Updated title to include TRIGGERS

Tags: docs, claude-md, sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: claude-md-sync
Semver: patch
